call_transcript: Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? Customer: Yeah, hi. Fine, I guess. Agent: Great! So, we're pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%.  Is that something you'd be interested in discussing? Customer: Well, I'm looking at consolidating some debt.  What are the terms like? Agent: Absolutely. The loan term is flexible, from 2 to 5 years.  We can tailor it to your monthly budget.  What kind of monthly payment are you comfortable with? Customer: I don't know, maybe around $200? Agent: Okay, let me run some numbers... With a 5-year term, your monthly payment would be approximately $198.  That includes the principal and interest.  There's a small origination fee of 1%, so $100. Customer: Hmm, okay. That sounds…reasonable. Agent: Excellent!  We can get the paperwork started right away.  Do you have a valid driver's license and proof of income handy? Customer: Yeah, I think so. Agent: Fantastic. Let's get this done for you.

Agent: Hello Mr. Miller, this is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We have a special offer on our Signature Credit Card. Customer: (Sighs) Look, you guys called me yesterday! Where did you even *get* my number? Agent: Sir, we…uh…it’s a marketing list. We are pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card at an interest rate of 15.5%. Customer: 15.5?! Are you kidding me? I have a perfectly good card already. Agent: Well, this card offers rewards points and… Customer: No, thank you. I'm not interested. And please, take me off your list. Agent: Okay, sir. I understand. Have a good day. (Click)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I understand you were referred to us by GreenTech Solutions.  How are you today? Customer: Yeah, hi. Doing good.  They said you guys had good rates. Agent: Absolutely! We're pre-approving you for a $20,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.25%. What are you planning to use the funds for? Customer: I'm thinking of renovating my kitchen. Agent: Excellent! A kitchen renovation is a great investment.  We can offer terms from 3 to 7 years.  What monthly payment are you looking at? Customer: I'd like to keep it under $350. Agent: Let me see… With a 5-year term, your monthly payment would be around $385.  However, we can extend it to 7 years, bringing it down to $310. There's a 2% origination fee, so $400. Customer: Hmm, $400 is a bit steep. Agent: I understand. We can potentially waive half of that fee if you enroll in automatic payments. Would that be something you'd consider? Customer: Yeah, okay, that sounds good. Agent: Perfect! Let's proceed with the application then.

Agent: Hello Michael, this is Lisa from Finance Solutions. I see you filled out an application for our Signature Credit Card online.  How are you doing today? Customer: Uh, yeah, hi. I'm okay. Just busy. Agent: I understand. We are pre-approving you for an $8,000 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 13.99%.  Are you looking to transfer a balance or make a large purchase? Customer: I was just checking rates, really. I have a couple of cards already. Agent: I see. Our card offers a 0% introductory APR for the first 6 months on balance transfers.  Plus, we have a rewards program. Customer: That's…interesting, but I think I'll stick with what I have for now.  Thanks anyway. Agent: Okay, no problem. If you change your mind, feel free to give us a call. Have a good day.

Agent: Hello Mrs. Davis, this is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special… Customer: (Interrupting) Hold on a minute. Who is this? I didn't ask for any calls. Where did you get my number? Agent: Ma'am, we are pre-approving you for a $3,000 Personal Loan at an interest rate of 18.5%. Customer: 18.5?! That's outrageous! I don't need a loan, and I don't appreciate you calling me. (Click)

Agent: Hi David, this is Alex from Finance Solutions. I see you applied for our Signature Credit Card online.  How are things going? Customer: Good, good. Just busy with work. Agent: I understand. We're pre-approving you for a $12,000 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 9.75%.  What are you hoping to use the card for? Customer: Probably just everyday expenses, you know, groceries, gas. Maybe a new laptop. Agent: Excellent. Our card offers 2% cashback on all purchases, and 3% on dining and travel.  We also have no annual fee.  The credit limit is $12,000, and the interest rate is 9.75%.  There's a one-time balance transfer fee of 3%, if applicable. Customer: That sounds pretty good, actually. What's the APR? Agent: The APR is 9.75%, and it's variable. We can also offer a lower rate if you set up automatic payments. Customer: Okay, that's something to consider. Agent: Great! We can get the application finalized right now. Do you have your social security number and date of birth handy? Customer: Yeah, I do. Let's do it.

Agent: Hi Linda, this is Mark from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a personal loan. How are you this evening? Customer: I'm alright. What's this about? Agent: We're pre-approving you for a $7,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 11.25%.  What are you hoping to use the funds for? Customer: I need to pay some medical bills. They're piling up. Agent: I understand. We can definitely help with that. We offer flexible repayment terms, from 2 to 5 years.  What monthly payment would be comfortable for you? Customer: I'm not sure. I'm on a fixed income. Agent: Let's look at a 5-year term. That would be approximately $160 per month. There's a 1.5% origination fee, so $105. Customer: Hmm, that's…doable. Agent: Great! I can send you an email with all the details, including a link to the application. Would that be okay? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

Agent: Hello Mr. Lee, this is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We have a fantastic offer on our… Customer: (Interrupting, loudly) Are you kidding me?! You people called me *yesterday*! I told you I wasn't interested! Where did you even get my number?! This is harassment! Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 10.5%... Customer: (Shouting) I don't want your card! Take me off your list *now*! (Click)

Agent: Hi Maria, this is David from Finance Solutions. Welcome back! I see you're an existing customer. How are you doing today? Customer: Hi David, I'm good, thanks. I was looking at consolidating some debt, and I saw you had personal loans. Agent: Absolutely! We're pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 9.5%. What kind of debt are you looking to consolidate? Customer: Credit card debt, mostly. It's just getting out of hand. Agent: I understand. A personal loan can be a great way to simplify your payments and potentially lower your interest rate. We offer terms from 2 to 7 years. What monthly payment are you comfortable with? Customer: I'd like to keep it under $300, if possible. Agent: Let me see… With a 5-year term, your monthly payment would be approximately $290. There's a 2% origination fee, so $300. Customer: Okay, that sounds pretty good. What's the total cost of the loan over 5 years? Agent: The total cost, including principal and interest, would be approximately $17,400.  We can also offer a slightly lower rate if you enroll in automatic payments. Customer: Okay, let's do it. I'm ready to apply.

Agent: Hello Mr. Thompson, this is Lisa from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special… Customer: (Interrupting) Where did you get my number? I'm not interested in any credit cards. I'm currently unemployed. Agent: Sir, we are pre-approving you for a $2,000 Signature Credit Card at an interest rate of 22.99%. Customer: 22.99?! Are you serious? I can't afford that! I'm not even working! Agent: Well, this card can help you rebuild your credit… Customer: No, thank you. Don't call me again. (Click)
